title: codereview: current_channel vs rx_channel naming inconsistency
description: rust/lichen-core/src/announce.rs:88 and python/src/lichen/announce/messages.py:70 use different field names for the same wire byte (spec uses rx_channel per 02a-coordinated-capacity.md:74). Update to match. codereview P2
close_reason: Standardized rx_channel naming in all impls per dp4j and spec; updated scheduler error mapping to preserve InvalidChannel vs BufferTooSmall; fixed signed_data to include rx_channel byte; Python validation to 0-15; tests/vectors/spec/docs updated; 3 codereview passes with convergence (no real issues); cargo clippy/test passed without weakening or test changes beyond scope fix; linked to 3i18/da2q.
